summary: Chest wall irradiation should only be considered in select cases within node-negative breast cancer due to lack of demonstrated benefit; standard practice avoids its inclusion without clear risk factors supporting necessity. This aligns with guideline recommendations favoring patient-specific assessment over broad application.
